title: T-134 — Foundation scanner route-group isolation + ScannerFrame device chrome
prompt:
# T-134 — Foundation scanner shell isolation Wave: `app-shell-foundation-20260520` (00-foundation). Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`. ## Goal Replace the T-133 pass-through stub at `apps/web/app/[locale]/(scanner)/layout.tsx` with the ScannerFrame device chrome (390×844). The `(scanner)` route group is a deliberate exception: it MUST NOT inherit the AppShell desktop layout from `(app)`. Scanner pages mount under `(scanner)` (siblings of `(app)`, not children), so `app-sidebar` / `app-topbar` are physically absent from their DOM. ## Prototype source of truth - `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/shell.jsx:1-66` — `ScannerFrame`, `StatusBar`, `Content`, `BottomActions`. - Brief `/tmp/monopilot-shell-gap-brief-combined.md` §3 Luka F + §7 risks (scanner inherits AppShell = KRYTYCZNE). ## Files (scope) - `apps/web/app/[locale]/(scanner)/layout.tsx` [modify — replace T-133 stub with the ScannerFrame mount] - `apps/web/components/shell/scanner-frame.tsx` [create — Client Component (`'use client'`) device chrome 390×844 with notch + status bar + content + bottom-actions slots] - `apps/web/components/shell/__tests__/scanner-frame.test.tsx` [create — RTL fixture, axe-core 0 violations] - `apps/web/e2e/scanner-isolation.spec.ts` [create — Playwright: visit a scanner placeholder route, assert ScannerFrame present, AppSidebar/AppTopbar absent] - `apps/web/app/[locale]/(scanner)/dev/scanner/page.tsx` [create — minimal placeholder Server Component at `//dev/scanner` rendering inside ScannerFrame so the e2e spec has a route to load; carries `// TODO(scanner-module): replace when scanner module lands` header comment] Do NOT modify `proxy.ts`, `[locale]/layout.tsx`, `[locale]/(app)/layout.tsx` (UI-131), or any T-XXX.json outside this wave. Do NOT add any other scanner route — the placeholder is the e2e harness only. ## Contract ```tsx // apps/web/components/shell/scanner-frame.tsx export interface ScannerFrameProps { statusBar?: ReactNode; bottomActions?: ReactNode; children: ReactNode; } export function ScannerFrame(props: ScannerFrameProps): JSX.Element; ``` Root: `
`. Layout: 1. notch (decorative div), 2. `
{statusBar}
`, 3. `
{children}
`, 4. `
{bottomActions}
`. ```tsx // apps/web/app/[locale]/(scanner)/layout.tsx (Server Component) export default function ScannerLayout({ children }: { children: ReactNode }): JSX.Element ``` Centres ScannerFrame in the viewport (`flex min-h-screen items-center justify-center bg-shell-bg`). Mounts `{children}`. NO Supabase session fetch, NO sidebar import, NO topbar import. ## Acceptance criteria 1. `apps/web/app/[locale]/(scanner)/layout.tsx` does NOT import `AppSidebar`, `AppTopbar`, or `(app)/layout.tsx`. Grep proof in closeout. 2. Visiting `/en/dev/scanner` renders `data-testid=scanner-frame`, `scanner-status-bar`, `scanner-content`, `scanner-bottom-actions`; computed width 390px, computed height 844px (from UI-127 tokens). 3. Visiting `/en/dev/scanner` response body does NOT contain `data-testid="app-sidebar"`, `data-testid="app-topbar"`, or `data-testid="app-shell"`. 4. Visiting `/en/` still renders `data-testid="app-shell"` (UI-131 unchanged). 5. RTL `scanner-frame.test.tsx` asserts the four test-ids + axe-core 0 violations. 6. Playwright `scanner-isolation.spec.ts` asserts the presence/absence contract above. 7. `pnpm --filter web test scanner-frame -- --run`, `pnpm exec playwright test e2e/scanner-isolation.spec.ts`, typecheck, lint all pass. 8. `apps/web/proxy.ts`, `apps/web/app/[locale]/(app)/layout.tsx`, and `apps/web/components/shell/app-sidebar.tsx|app-topbar.tsx` are byte-identical before/after. ## Out of scope - Real scanner module pages (a future module wave). - Any scanner business logic (scan, decode, route). - Touch keyboard / haptics / camera (future). - Mobile responsive variants beyond the 390×844 device frame. - Modifying AppShell components. ## RED test Write `scanner-frame.test.tsx` and `scanner-isolation.spec.ts` first; they must fail because the component and route do not exist. ## Risk red lines - `(scanner)` MUST be a sibling route group of `(app)`, NEVER nested under `(app)`. T-133 created the sibling group. - Do NOT import any `(app)` component or layout into `(scanner)`. The Playwright assert is the contract. - Do NOT introduce a Supabase auth check inside `(scanner)/layout.tsx` — scanner auth model is the scanner module's deliverable. - Do NOT modify `apps/web/proxy.ts` or the AppShell layouts. - Do NOT introduce any new scanner URL beyond the `_dev` harness placeholder. ## Closeout (fail-closed) Provide: screenshots (390×844 emulator viewport for `/en/dev/scanner` + desktop-1280 for `/en/` showing AppShell unchanged), screenshot_or_dom_diff_artifacts against `scanner/shell.jsx:1-66`, visual_parity_evidence, prototype_reference, console_network_check, acceptance_criteria_status, test_commands_and_results, changed_files, git_status, deviations_from_prototype. `ui_parity_evidence_missing` blocks closeout. ## Route harness rule Use `apps/web/app/[locale]/(scanner)/dev/scanner/page.tsx` for the e2e harness. Do not use `_dev`: underscored App Router segments are private/excluded and do not create public URLs.

pipeline_inputs.description: Replace (scanner)/layout.tsx stub with ScannerFrame device chrome (390×844). Sibling of (app); MUST NOT inherit AppSidebar/AppTopbar. Adds a minimal public dev/scanner placeholder route so the isolation Playwright spec has a route to load.
pipeline_inputs.details: ScannerFrame Client Component uses UI-127 --shell-scanner-w/h tokens and renders notch + status-bar + content + bottom-actions slots with stable data-testids. (scanner)/layout.tsx centres the frame, mounts no sidebar/topbar, no auth check. dev/scanner page is the e2e harness only (public URL segment; do not use an underscored private segment). RTL + Playwright contract asserts presence on /en/dev/scanner and absence of AppShell test-ids.
acceptance_criteria: (scanner)/layout.tsx imports neither AppSidebar nor AppTopbar nor (app) layout
/en/dev/scanner renders scanner-frame at 390x844 with status-bar, content, bottom-actions test-ids
/en/dev/scanner response body contains no app-sidebar, app-topbar, app-shell test-ids
Vitest scanner-frame spec passes; Playwright scanner-isolation spec passes
test_strategy: pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter web lint
git diff --name-only apps/web/proxy.ts apps/web/app/[locale]/(app)/layout.tsx apps/web/components/shell/app-sidebar.tsx apps/web/components/shell/app-topbar.tsx -- expected empty
risk_red_lines: (scanner) must remain a sibling of (app); never nest inside (app)
Do not import any (app) component or layout into (scanner)
Do not add a Supabase auth check inside (scanner)/layout.tsx
Do not modify apps/web/proxy.ts or AppShell components
Do not introduce any scanner URL beyond the /dev/scanner harness
pipeline_inputs.target_route: /{locale}/dev/scanner (e2e harness) — production scanner routes ship with the scanner module wave
